debug_info.goal:
case corec
n : ℕ
F : TypeVec.{u} (n + 1) → Type u
inst✝ : MvQPF F
α : TypeVec.{u} n
self : @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk n F inst✝ α
f : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α → F (α ::: @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk n F inst✝ α) :=
  fun self =>
    map
      (TypeVec.id :::
        @MvQPF.StateCofixShrunk.corec n F inst✝ α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α self) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α self))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest n F α self)
a b : @MvQPF.Coalg n F α
h_bisim :
  let un := @MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b;
  ∃ R, @MvQPF.Coalg.IsBisim n F inst✝ α un R ∧ R (Sum.inl (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) (Sum.inr (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))
σ✝ : Type u
un : σ✝ → F (α ::: σ✝)
d' : σ✝
h_un : @MvQPF.Coalg.union n F inst✝ α a b = @MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α σ✝ un d'
⊢ map
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        @ofLarge n F inst✝ α
          (Quot.mk (@MvQPF.Coalg.Bisim n F inst✝ α)
            (@MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α a) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α a) init)))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α a (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α a)) =
    map
      (TypeVec.id ::: fun init =>
        @ofLarge n F inst✝ α
          (Quot.mk (@MvQPF.Coalg.Bisim n F inst✝ α)
            (@MvQPF.Coalg.corec n F α (@MvQPF.Coalg.σ n F α b) (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α b) init)))
      (@MvQPF.Coalg.dest' n F α b (@MvQPF.Coalg.s n F α b))

failed_attempts:
rcases h_bisim with ⟨R, hR, hRab⟩
    let c := a.union b
    let g (x : c.σ) : StateCofixShrunk F α := corec c.dest' x
    have h_eq : ∀ x y, R x y → g x = g y := by
      intro x y hxy
      apply congrArg StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge
      apply Quot.sound
      use R
      exact ⟨hR, hxy⟩
    calc
      _ = map (TypeVec.id ::: g ∘ Sum.inl) (a.dest' a.s) := by
        congr; funext s
        apply congrArg StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge; apply Quot.sound
        use fun x y => y = Sum.inl x
        constructor
        · intro u v heq; subst heq; rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
          use map (fun i => (i, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inl) i)) (a.dest' u)
          simp [MvFunctor.map_map]; constructor <;> try rfl
          intro i; cases i <;> simp; rfl
        · rfl
      _ = map (TypeVec.id ::: g) (c.dest' (Sum.inl a.s)) := by
        rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_left, MvFunctor.map_map]; rfl
      _ = map (TypeVec.id ::: g) (c.dest' (Sum.inr b.s)) := by
        apply MvFunctor.map_eq_map_of_liftR (RelLast _ R) _ _ (hR _ _ hRab)
        intro i x y hrel
        cases i <;> [cases hrel; exact h_eq _ _ hrel]
        rfl
      _ = map (TypeVec.id ::: g ∘ Sum.inr) (b.dest' b.s) := by
        rw [Coalg.union_dest_eq_right, MvFunctor.map_map]; rfl
      _ = map (TypeVec.id ::: fun init => StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge (Quot.mk Coalg.Bisim (Coalg.corec b.dest' init))) (b.dest' b.s) := by
        congr; funext s
        apply congrArg StateCofixShrunk.ofLarge; apply Quot.sound
        use fun x y => y = Sum.inr x
        constructor
        · intro u v heq; subst heq; rw [MvQPF.liftR_iff]
          use map (fun i => (i, (TypeVec.id ::: Sum.inr) i)) (b.dest' u)
          simp [MvFunctor.map_map]; constructor <;> try rfl
          intro i; cases i <;> simp; rfl
        · rfl
  Quot.lift f h (StateCofixShrunk.toLarge self)
